summary: Translation feature testing for CryptoNai. All translation features working: /api/translate endpoint, language switching UI (FR/EN/ES), and all main pages load without 'Server Error' or 't is not defined' errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Translation API uses GPT-4o with MongoDB caching - working correctly
useContentTranslation hook properly handles translation state and caching
Language selector (FR/EN/ES) visible when logged in, in top-right header
All tested pages load without Server Errors

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load without errors, language switching works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation features fully implemented and tested. /api/translate endpoint uses GPT-4o for French-to-English/Spanish translation with MongoDB caching. Language selector in header (FR/EN/ES) working. All pages tested: Homepage, Login, Marketplace, Mentor List (/pro), VIP Hub, Admin Panel, Mentor Profile - all load without errors.

pages_tested.homepage: PASS - Loads with French UI by default
pages_tested.marketplace: PASS - Offers display correctly, useContentTranslation integrated
pages_tested.mentor_list: PASS - /pro page shows 2 mentors, useContentTranslation for bios
pages_tested.vip_hub: PASS - Shows VIP status and features
pages_tested.admin: PASS - Admin panel loads with French UI
pages_tested.mentor_profile: PASS - Profile page loads without errors

language_switching_tested.fr_to_en: PASS - UI changes from French to English (Bonjour→Hello, Actions rapides→Quick Actions)
language_switching_tested.language_selector_location: Top-right header, visible when logged in

api_tests./api/translate: PASS - Translates French to English using GPT-4o
api_tests./api/translate_caching: PASS - MongoDB caching prevents duplicate API calls
api_tests./api/translate_unsupported: PASS - Returns error for unsupported languages
api_tests./api/auth/login: PASS - Both VIP and Admin login work
